title: Canadian Jewish Heritage Month Act
description: Canadian Jewish Heritage Month Act (Canadian Jewish Heritage Month Act). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the Canadian Jewish Heritage Month Act .

provisions.title: Canadian Jewish Heritage Month
provisions.content: 2 Throughout Canada, in each and every year, the month of May is to be known as “Canadian Jewish Heritage Month”.
